name: Holy Basil Extract
summary: Human RCT evidence suggests holy basil extract may reduce stress and anxiety symptoms, though study size and replication are limited.
description: Human RCT evidence suggests holy basil extract may reduce stress and anxiety symptoms, though study size and replication are limited.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: known hypersensitivity to holy basil or other Ocimum species
pregnancy due to potential uterine-stimulant effect and insufficient safety data
fertility concerns due to possible reduction in sperm count and motility at high doses in animal studies
diabetes medications or insulin due to added hypoglycemia risk
anticoagulant or antiplatelet medications due to bleeding risk
discontinue before scheduled surgery due to bleeding and blood-sugar risk
